author: Alex Johnson
text: This is exactly what I needed. Followed along and got it working in under 2 hours. The PostgreSQL section was super clear!

author: Priya Nair
text: The pacing in this tutorial is great. Fast enough to stay interesting, but not so fast that I got lost.

author: Marcus Lee
text: Would love a follow-up where you add auth and deployment. This is one of the cleanest demos I've seen in a while.

author: Sofia Chen
text: I finally understand how the frontend and backend connect. The API section clicked for me immediately.

author: Daniel Ortiz
text: Appreciate that you showed the mistakes and fixed them instead of editing around them. That made it feel real.

author: Emma Brooks
text: The React section was my favorite. Clean structure, practical state management, and no fluff.

author: Noah Kim
text: Paused a bunch of times to code along and the project still came together smoothly. Strong tutorial.

author: Lina Farah
text: Saved this immediately. The database integration section is better than most paid courses.
